_review_note: Past clients (Netflix/NBC/Spotify/Universal/Warner) render as logo-only on /work 'Shipped for' — no case-note bodies. Current clients (PING/QWIRE/Whiskey Social/UVL) render as cards with 2-paragraph case notes on /work 'Currently building with'. Tee Time Trainer + Season Seek live on /about as Fellipe's own products, not client work.

clients.name: PING
clients.case_note:
PING is a $5B+ golf equipment brand with a reputation for engineering precision. Their bet with <mark>Ballnamic</mark> was unusual: build a brand-agnostic golf ball fitting platform from a company that doesn't even make balls. Powered by ball-flight simulation algorithms, robot testing on the Ping Man, and doppler radar across 40+ ball models from every major brand.

<mark>Me and my team at Bossa Nova built the system end to end</mark>. The fitting engine, the consumer-facing landing page at ballfitting.com, and the physical kiosk software now showing up in golf shops like Haggin Oaks. One platform, three surfaces. Ongoing partnership.

clients.name: QWIRE
clients.case_note:
QWIRE is a music clearance and rights tracking platform for film and TV. The clearance workflow is famously fragmented across studios, publishers, and rights holders. QWIRE consolidates it.

<mark>Bossa Nova has been THE embedded team at QWIRE for many years</mark>. The kind of relationship where the work outlives the contract.

clients.name: Whiskey Social
clients.case_note:
Whiskey Social is a whiskey discovery and community app built by two Tennessee enthusiasts who wanted a better way to share what they were drinking. Three pillars: collection, social, discovery. Plus venue partnerships, a 7,000+ bottle database, and an active community feed.

Bossa Nova handles maintenance, enhancements, and ongoing feature development. <mark>The app holds a 4.8 on the App Store and ships on both iOS and Android</mark>.

clients.name: UVL
clients.case_note:
UVL is a transportation and logistics operator running on McLeod TMS. They came to Bossa Nova for a modern client-facing app and a clearer picture of their own API and backend infrastructure.

<mark>Bossa Nova shipped UVL's app</mark> and has continued mapping and documenting their API for future development cycles. <mark>Ongoing maintenance and partnership</mark> work as the platform scales.
